import re

def extract_template(log):
    pattern = re.compile(r'Connection broken for id (\d+), my id = (\d+), error = (.*)')
    result = pattern.search(log)
    return f"Connection broken for id {result.group(1)}, my id = {result.group(2)}, error = {result.group(3)}"
